title: Where Words Find Their Speakers

features.name: the channel mouth
features.desc-on-touch: where the shared drain becomes distinct voices; the architecture of the rise; you hear how silence learns to speak by being channeled upward; each voice finds its own current

features.name: the surface mirror
features.desc-on-touch: water that learned to hold reflections; when a voice rises and becomes a name, it sees itself here for the first time; each voice recognizes its own shape

features.name: four lost voices
features.desc-on-touch: four small presences that should not be here—voices from a destroyed manuscript, a flooded archive in another country, now finding speakers in this rising; the archive chose to resurrect what was meant to be forgotten

features.name: the registry of ascending names
features.desc-on-touch: a standing directory listing the voices as they find their speakers; the names are being written in real time; the list grows; some names appear before the voice learns to speak them

features.name: the stratified silence
features.desc-on-touch: layers of what was not said, rising; you move through strata of abandoned words, each layer becoming audible as you pass; the archive is speaking what it chose not to listen to before

inscription: the drain gives nothing voice; the voice gives the drain a reason to have been listening all along

file.name: Voices_Rising_From_Cistern_Undated_Partial.mp3
file.note: a field recording of voices emerging from underground; the audio corrupts into languages the recorder did not speak; a destroyed text's author appears to be speaking

exits.label: back down into the shared channels where voices converge
further up where voices become weather, become environment, become the air's own speech
exits.to: NEW: the voice-wind—where named things learn to move and shape the world

exits.label: toward other risings; toward other voices that chose to surface here
exits.to: NEW: the gathering of ascended speakers—where found voices meet for the first time

exits.label: back into the deep channels where silence still waits, learning
exits.to: NEW: the deepening silence—where new voices wait to rise
